ai_boundary.future_challenger: A multibillion-parameter local model may later issue an asynchronous market-level risk veto. Its prompt must be label-free, its response applies only after local receipt, and it must improve paired held-out stress utility or drawdown versus the frozen fast model.
ai_boundary.reason: The measured local qwen3:8b response latency is seconds, while the decision loop and execution delays are subsecond. Calling an LLM in the execution loop would create stale decisions.

candidate_models.challenger_gate: Do not fit a neural challenger unless ridge_logit passes every validation viability gate. A challenger cannot be selected from test results.
candidate_models.control: no_trade with zero exposure, zero PnL, and zero drawdown

fast_baseline.features: Frozen chosen-outcome orientation of the existing causal Polymarket feature-v5 row; no target-derived, settlement, or future-book value.
fast_baseline.optimization_metric: validation log loss; ties select stronger regularization

neural_challenger_if_authorized.architecture: Two-layer MLP with widths 64 and 32, GELU activations, and one sigmoid output. No transformer or recurrence in this round.
neural_challenger_if_authorized.device_contract: Training may use a verified compatible GPU backend, but must produce the same frozen split and bounded prediction tolerance as CPU. Export accepted inference to ONNX; Windows ML is preferred for vendor-neutral Windows inference because DirectML is now in maintenance mode.
neural_challenger_if_authorized.selection: Must beat ridge_logit on validation log loss and validation sequential stress utility, then be evaluated exactly once on the untouched test groups.

candidate_models.threshold_selection: Among validation thresholds with at least 30 sequential completed trades overall and five per asset, positive aggregate stress utility, positive median market PnL, and no filled-entry/failed-exit event, select the highest Wilson lower bound for positive-complete precision; ties select the higher threshold. If none pass, select no_trade.

data_contract.confirmation_capture: A run must start after this contract hash is committed, finish strict and gap-free, have no queue saturation or recorder error, and pass the complete integrity audit.
data_contract.development_only_runs: Any run captured before this contract, any segmented run, and the active queue-saturated long capture may diagnose plumbing or reject a model family but cannot confirm an edge.
data_contract.prospective_public_sources: Polymarket public level-2 market channel, direct Binance spot bookTicker and aggTrade streams, RTDS Chainlink settlement-reference stream, immutable Gamma/CLOB market metadata, and recorded execution parameters.
data_contract.replay_memory: Process immutable market-condition batches after one full-run integrity audit. Repeating the full audit per batch or materializing the entire long run in RAM is prohibited.
data_contract.source_time_rule: Local monotonic receipt time controls causal availability and elapsed duration. Exchange/source timestamps are provenance and lag features, never permission to use data before local receipt.

decision_contract.conflict_resolution: Score Up and Down from the same causal feature row. If both pass, choose the higher probability; ties abstain.
decision_contract.position_limit: At most one bot-owned open position per condition. No overlapping action labels are credited in sequential validation or test PnL.
decision_contract.reentry: A failed entry may release the condition only when its execution-confirmation time is locally known. A completed exit may release it only at exit receipt. A failed exit blocks the condition for the rest of the market.
decision_contract.risk_priority: Abstention is always valid. No minimum trade count overrides execution, freshness, liquidity, cooldown, or risk gates.

execution_contract.entry: Share-sized V2 FOK buy of the recorded minimum order quantity against the first same-segment book received after 500 ms local submission latency plus the latest recorded venue taker delay; confirmation must arrive within 500 ms.
execution_contract.exit: FOK sell of exactly the filled bot-owned quantity after 1000 ms from confirmed entry receipt, another 500 ms local latency, and the independently recorded venue taker delay; confirmation must arrive within 500 ms.
execution_contract.fees: Walk displayed depth and charge the recorded V2 feeSchedule at every matched level on both legs, rounded conservatively to five USDC decimals. No rebate, midpoint, hidden depth, partial-fill, or last-trade credit.
execution_contract.final_window: Both entry and exit targets must be at least 30 seconds before market end.
execution_contract.inventory: Unlike the Round 8 ceiling, no prepositioned-inventory assumption may turn an unowned outcome into a sellable position.
execution_contract.parameters: Recorded tick size, minimum size, itode taker delay, minimum order age, and V2 fee schedule are required at simulated arrival. Unknown never means zero.

feature_contract.chosen_outcome_orientation: For Down actions, sign-reverse directional Binance/Chainlink distance, return, flow, diffusion-gap, and microprice-deviation features and swap chosen/opposite outcome book fields. Volatility, spread, age, depth magnitude, liquidity, volume, and remaining time remain unsigned.
current_feature_family: 100/250/1000/5000 ms Binance returns and trade imbalance
chosen and opposite outcome microprice deviations and top imbalance
displayed depth, market liquidity, and market volume
forbidden: execution result, terminal reason, fill price, or action label
LLM output produced after the decision timestamp
feature_contract.sequence_challenger: Temporal MLP/TLOB/TCN inputs are deferred. They require a separately frozen sequence and normalization contract after the point-in-time baseline establishes viability.

label_contract.action_unavailable: Missing/stale execution parameters, continuity failure, invalid active tick, excluded close window, or other information known to block order creation. Count and report; exclude from classifier fitting and never reinterpret as a negative market prediction.
label_contract.entry_no_fill: An admissible entry FOK that does not fill receives positive_complete=false and stress_utility_quote=0 because no inventory or PnL was created.
label_contract.filled_entry_failed_exit: positive_complete=false; stress_utility_quote equals negative full entry cost, zero recovery is assumed, and the condition is blocked. This deliberately penalizes stale-position risk rather than hiding it.
label_contract.positive_complete: Both exact FOK legs fill and net exit proceeds minus entry cost is strictly positive after both fees.
label_contract.successful_round_trip: Both exact FOK legs fill; stress_utility_quote equals net exit proceeds minus entry cost, including negative values.
label_contract.unit: One causal feature row, one chosen outcome, one fixed execution path. Every label is hash-bound to feature row, source books, execution-parameter snapshots, and this contract.

promotion_gate.development_pass: On untouched chronological test groups: positive aggregate sequential stress utility; positive median market PnL; no filled-entry/failed-exit event; positive PnL for every asset; at least 30 completed trades overall and five per asset; and selected model exceeds no_trade and ridge_logit where applicable.
promotion_gate.market_group_bootstrap: Report a market-time-group block-bootstrap confidence interval for mean PnL only when at least 30 untouched time groups exist. Fewer groups must be labeled insufficient, never padded with overlapping ticks.
promotion_gate.multiple_testing: Record every fitted L2, threshold, and challenger. Apply deflated-Sharpe/PBO diagnostics only when their sample and strategy-count assumptions are met; otherwise report them unavailable.

reporting_contract.required_truth_labels: Every graph must show exact UTC span, run ID, assets, market counts, decision cadence, latency, hold, fee/depth semantics, causal versus diagnostic status, and whether drawdown is realized-only or mark-to-market.
reporting_contract.round_8_oracle_not_a_baseline: Round 8 best-future timing is an upper-bound mechanism screen and must never be plotted as a causal model benchmark.

split_contract.group: Synchronized five-minute event-start timestamp across BTC, ETH, and SOL. All rows and both outcomes from one group stay together.
split_contract.minimum_outcome_breadth: Every train, validation, and test partition must contain both official Up and Down market outcomes for every asset. Outcomes validate market diversity only and are never action features.
split_contract.selection: Chronological train, one purged group, validation, one purged group, and untouched test. Fit preprocessing on train only. L2 and probability threshold use validation only. Test is evaluated once.
